232:# If gcov support was enabled by the configure script, add the appropriate
235:# causes build errors with -fprofile-arcs -ftest-coverage with some GCCs.
236:# Supposedly GCC does the right thing if you use --coverage, but in
243:CFLAGS.gcov1 = -DSQLITE_COVERAGE_TEST=1 -fprofile-arcs -ftest-coverage
244:LDFLAGS.gcov1 = -lgcov
245:USE_GCOV = @USE_GCOV@
246:T.compile.gcov = $(CFLAGS.gcov$(USE_GCOV))
247:T.link.gcov = $(LDFLAGS.gcov$(USE_GCOV))

246:T.compile.gcov = $(CFLAGS.gcov$(USE_GCOV))
247:T.link.gcov = $(LDFLAGS.gcov$(USE_GCOV))
---build---
./jimsh /app/sqlite/tool/mkopcodec.tcl opcodes.h >opcodes.c
cc -g -o mksourceid /app/sqlite/tool/mksourceid.c
./jimsh /app/sqlite/tool/mksqlite3h.tcl /app/sqlite -o sqlite3.h
cp /app/sqlite/ext/fts5/fts5parse.y .
rm -f fts5parse.h
./lemon  -S fts5parse.y
./jimsh /app/sqlite/ext/fts5/tool/mkfts5c.tcl
cp /app/sqlite/ext/fts5/fts5.h .
rm -rf tsrc
mkdir tsrc
cp -f /app/sqlite/src/alter.c /app/sqlite/src/analyze.c /app/sqlite/src/attach.c /app/sqlite/src/auth.c /app/sqlite/src/backup.c /app/sqlite/src/bitvec.c /app/sqlite/src/btmutex.c /app/sqlite/ext/fts3/fts3.h /app/sqlite/ext/fts3/fts3Int.h /app/sqlite/ext/fts3/fts3_aux.c /app/sqlite/ext/fts3/fts3_expr.c /app/sqlite/ext/fts3/fts3_hash.c /app/sqlite/ext/fts3/fts3_hash.h /app/sqlite/ext/fts3/fts3_tokenizer1.c /app/sqlite/ext/fts3/fts3_tokenize_vtab.c /app/sqlite/ext/fts3/fts3_unicode.c /app/sqlite/ext/fts3/fts3_unicode2.c /app/sqlite/ext/fts3/fts3_write.c /app/sqlite/ext/icu/sqliteicu.h /app/sqlite/ext/icu/icu.c /app/sqlite/ext/rtree/rtree.h /app/sqlite/ext/rtree/rtree.c /app/sqlite/ext/rtree/geopoly.c /app/sqlite/ext/session/sqlite3session.c /app/sqlite/ext/session/sqlite3session.h /app/sqlite/ext/rbu/sqlite3rbu.h /app/sqlite/ext/rbu/sqlite3rbu.c /app/sqlite/ext/misc/stmt.c keywordhash.h opcodes.c opcodes.h parse.c parse.h sqlite_cfg.h shell.c sqlite3.h tsrc
rm -f tsrc/sqlite.h.in tsrc/parse.y
./jimsh /app/sqlite/tool/vdbe-compress.tcl  <tsrc/vdbe.c >vdbe.new
mv -f vdbe.new tsrc/vdbe.c
cp fts5.c fts5.h tsrc
touch .target_source
cc -g -o src-verify /app/sqlite/tool/src-verify.c
./jimsh /app/sqlite/tool/mksqlite3c.tcl --linemacros=0 
cp tsrc/sqlite3ext.h .
cp /app/sqlite/ext/session/sqlite3session.h .
cc -fPIC -O2 -g  -DSQLITE_ENABLE_MATH_FUNCTIONS -DSQLITE_THREADSAFE=1   -DSQLITE_COVERAGE_TEST=1 -fprofile-arcs -ftest-coverage -D_HAVE_SQLITE_CONFIG_H -DBUILD_sqlite -DNDEBUG -I. -I/app/sqlite/src -I/app/sqlite/ext/rtree -I/app/sqlite/ext/icu -I/app/sqlite/ext/fts3 -I/app/sqlite/ext/session -I/app/sqlite/ext/misc -lgcov -o sqlite3 \
	shell.c sqlite3.c \
	 \
	 -DSQLITE_HAVE_ZLIB=1 -DSQLITE_DQS=0 -DSQLITE_ENABLE_FTS4 -DSQLITE_ENABLE_RTREE -DSQLITE_ENABLE_EXPLAIN_COMMENTS -DSQLITE_ENABLE_UNKNOWN_SQL_FUNCTION -DSQLITE_ENABLE_STMTVTAB -DSQLITE_ENABLE_DBPAGE_VTAB -DSQLITE_ENABLE_DBSTAT_VTAB -DSQLITE_ENABLE_BYTECODE_VTAB -DSQLITE_ENABLE_OFFSET_SQL_FUNC -DSQLITE_STRICT_SUBTYPE=1  \
	-Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib  -lm  -lz

cc -fPIC -O2 -g  -DSQLITE_ENABLE_MATH_FUNCTIONS -DSQLITE_THREADSAFE=1   -DSQLITE_COVERAGE_TEST=1 -fprofile-arcs -ftest-coverage -D_HAVE_SQLITE_CONFIG_H -DBUILD_sqlite -DNDEBUG -I. -I/app/sqlite/src -I/app/sqlite/ext/rtree -I/app/sqlite/ext/icu -I/app/sqlite/ext/fts3 -I/app/sqlite/ext/session -I/app/sqlite/ext/misc -lgcov -o sqlite3 \
	shell.c sqlite3.c \
	 \
	 -DSQLITE_HAVE_ZLIB=1 -DSQLITE_DQS=0 -DSQLITE_ENABLE_FTS4 -DSQLITE_ENABLE_RTREE -DSQLITE_ENABLE_EXPLAIN_COMMENTS -DSQLITE_ENABLE_UNKNOWN_SQL_FUNCTION -DSQLITE_ENABLE_STMTVTAB -DSQLITE_ENABLE_DBPAGE_VTAB -DSQLITE_ENABLE_DBSTAT_VTAB -DSQLITE_ENABLE_BYTECODE_VTAB -DSQLITE_ENABLE_OFFSET_SQL_FUNC -DSQLITE_STRICT_SUBTYPE=1  \
	-Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib  -lm  -lz

input.command: ln -sf /app/sqlite/sqlite3 /usr/local/bin/sqlite3 && rm -f /app/sqlite/*.gcda && hash -r; which sqlite3; command -v sqlite3; sqlite3 --version

content.text:
Done. SQLite 3.50.4 compiled with gcov instrumentation and on PATH.

**What I did:**
1. Verified the vendored tarball checksum against `.sha256` — matched.
2. Installed toolchain (`build-essential`, `tcl`), extracted to `/app/sqlite`.
3. Configured with coverage: `./configure --gcov` → `USE_GCOV=1` in Makefile.
4. `make sqlite3` — compiled with `-DSQLITE_COVERAGE_TEST=1 -fprofile-arcs -ftest-coverage -lgcov`.
5. Symlinked `/app/sqlite/sqlite3` → `/usr/local/bin/sqlite3`.

**Verification:**
- `.gcno` files present next to the objects (instrumentation compiled in).
- Ran a query → `.gcda` files generated at runtime; `gcov -n sqlite3-sqlite3` reports line coverage of `sqlite3.c` — full instrument→run→report cycle works.
- `which sqlite3` → `/usr/local/bin/sqlite3`; `sqlite3 --version` → `3.50.4`.

(Removed the scratch `.gcda` files created during verification.)
